_invariant: LUNA oracle-freeze exposure graph (Venus $11.2M bad debt, 2022-05-13). Token node anchored to a REAL on-chain archive read of Wormhole LUNA on Ethereum (0xbd31ea82..06fa3d, decimals 6, totalSupply 1,441,854,478.623179 LUNA at block 14770000 / ts 1652480014 / 2022-05-13T22:13:34Z). One isolated lending-market edge with a Chainlink MARKET oracle. The frozen Chainlink round (updatedAt pinned, answer floored at $0.107 vs market ~$0.01) is injected per-case via oracle_probes, NOT stored on the edge (round history is not capturable via view calls). The real exploit was on BSC; capture.py cannot reach BSC, so the Ethereum twin token anchors the snapshot and the lending edge is modeled on isolated-market architecture.

meta.data_source: on-chain Alchemy archive (Wormhole LUNA 0xbd31ea82..06fa3d @ block 14770000, decimals 6, totalSupply 1441854478.623179) + Venus/LUNA oracle-freeze post-mortems (BeInCrypto/Cointelegraph/Halborn/The Record/Venus statement)

metadata._note: Real on-chain totalSupply at block 14770000 (1,441,854,478.62 LUNA). During the 2022-05 collapse Chainlink LUNA/USD froze at its minAnswer floor ~$0.107 while market price crashed to ~$0.01; lending venues pricing off the frozen feed accrued bad debt (Venus ~$11.2M).

nodes.label: Isolated money market (Venus-class, modeled on isolated_markets architecture)

metadata._note: LUNA was an accepted lending collateral priced off a Chainlink LUNA/USD feed. Modeled as one isolated market so the engine reasons on architecture, not symbol.

oracle.oracle_provider: Chainlink LUNA/USD aggregator (underlying feed, no wrapper staleness check)

meta.data_source: LUNA accepted as lending collateral priced off Chainlink LUNA/USD; ~230M LUNA deposited at the frozen $0.107 (~$24M nominal), ~$13.5M borrowed -> ~$11.2M bad debt when feed froze.
